column1: # Nano Sweep 03 — MATRIX_LR fine bracket, reduced batch (2026-04-20)
# Nano OOMs at line 547 (skip gate mix, forward pass) with full batch.
# Fix: TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=32768 (50% of default 65536) + TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=1024 (50% of 2048)
# → ~4x less activation memory per step. Results are relative comparisons, still valid.
# TIMEOUT_SECS=1800 — at reduced batch, steps are faster so 30 min should be enough.
